name: Stuffed Vidalia Onions
recipeIngredient: 1 envelope instant cream of chicken soup mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and wash the onions.
2. Simmer the onions in enough water to cover them for about 10 minutes, or until almost tender.
3. Remove the pulp from the onions, leaving only the two outer layers of the onion intact.
4. Add the onion pulp to a bowl with the remaining ingredients.
5. Place the onion shells in lightly greased muffin tins or custard cups.
6. Fill each onion shell with the stuffing and sprinkle with paprika.
7. Bake in a slow oven (325°F) for about 30 minutes.
8. To serve, arrange the stuffed onions around the meat.
Serves 6.
